chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3285 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.15536/2023 2. For hearing of main case 19.05.2025 Mr. Jawad A. Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Ms. Sakeena, Deputy Collector, CoC, Airport Karachi and Dr. Erum Zehra, Assistant Collector, CoC, JIAP. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar advocate is present and states under instructions that in any all correspondence / decision with respect to petitioner’s application for re-export are being withdrawn forthwith. Mr. Rajpar states that the notice for personal hearing shall be given to the petitioners within one week and after hearing the points of view the relevant application/s shall be decided in accordance with law vide a speaking order. He further states that pending the aforesaid status quo will be maintained and no further coercive action will be taken against the petitioners in respect of the subject matter herein. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
